# seerr_notification_discord (Resource)

Manage Seerr discord notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/discord.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `discord` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--discord))
- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String) Set of notification event types. Valid values include `MEDIA_PENDING`, `MEDIA_APPROVED`, `MEDIA_AVAILABLE`, `MEDIA_FAILED`, `MEDIA_DECLINED`, `MEDIA_AUTO_APPROVED`, `ISSUE_CREATED`, `ISSUE_COMMENT`, `ISSUE_RESOLVED`, `ISSUE_REOPENED`, `MEDIA_AUTO_REQUESTED`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--discord"></a>
### Nested Schema for `discord`

Required:

- `webhook_url` (String)

Optional:

- `bot_avatar_url` (String)
- `bot_username` (String)
- `enable_mentions` (Boolean)
